artifacts_policy: The build tree and compiler transcript were kept outside this metadata repo. No generated binaries, copied source, private assets, or restricted SDK material are committed.
blockers: x64 MSVC rejects legacy inline x86 assembly in inc/mscifix.h
first failing compile path observed through core/fmt/savescr.c
portable replacement or 32-bit compatibility strategy is required before claiming a core library build
next_actions: decide whether the next harness target should use a 32-bit MSVC configuration or a clean portable replacement for mscifix.h helpers
record a narrow compatibility patch plan before editing public source
rerun brender_core_float after the inline assembly blocker is isolated
public_notes: This is the first compiler transcript for the portable BRender core harness. It is intentionally recorded as a failed attempt with a specific blocker rather than as a completed build.
result_summary: The brender_core_float target reached the compiler and failed in inc/mscifix.h because x64 MSVC does not support the legacy __asm blocks used by the inspected source path.
